text: Adhit Upadhyay  Kathmandu, Nepal  adhit.upadhyay@deerwalk.edu.np    Respected Sir/Madam,    I am writing to express my strong interest in the Software Development Intern position at the  Digital Media Team (DMT) of DWIT's R&D Unit.

As an undergraduate in CSIT with a strong  enthusiasm for software development, I am interested in offering my skills and willingness to  learn towards creating valuable digital solutions with your vibrant team.
Over the course of my educational background, I have established good web development and  programming fundamentals as well as critical thinking and problem-solving abilities.
I have also  gained practical experience from academic and personal projects, where I learned organizational  and teamwork skills while discovering innovative solutions for challenges.
These experiences  have encouraged me to continue improving and learning new technologies.
I am particularly impressed by the Digital Media Team's effort on projects such as the Deerwalk  Learning Center, DRM Website, and others.

The idea of being in an organization working daily  towards developing innovative digital solutions for learning excites me because it aligns with my  own aspiration to become a skilled and efficient software developer.
Based on my programming skills, learning spirit, and commitment to teamwork, I think I can be  a responsible and supportive intern.
I am looking forward to extending my skills under the  guidance of experienced seniors and making contributions to meaningful projects at DMT.
Thank you so much for the time taken to go through my application.
I have attached my resume  for your ease and look forward to the potential of contributing to DMT's inspiring projects.
